message:
refactor: continue clippy lint fixes across codebase

- Use `io::Error::other()` shorthand consistently
- Use method reference `std::io::Error::kind` instead of closure
- Use char literals for single-char patterns in assertions
- Use inline format args in test println! statements
- Use `String::new()` instead of `"".to_string()`

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
